title: polygala forojulensis subsp. carniolica
intro: Polygala forojulensis subsp. carniolica, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala forojulensis subsp. carniolica include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
